\tzpentry{ID3591}{Field Vector Potential Functional}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3591 introduces Field Vector Potential Functional as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} T_{\text{field}} = \frac{\epsilon_0}{2} \int_{\mathbb{R}^3} \left(\frac{\partial \vec{A}}{\partial t}\right) \cdot \left(\frac{\partial \vec{A}}{\partial t}\right) d^3x \end{equation}
